fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the setup of a service to update currency exchange rates.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the setup of a service to update currency exchange rates.

fields.name: Enabled
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the currency exchange rate service is enabled.

fields.name: Service Provider
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the service provider.

fields.name: Terms of Service
fields.tooltip: Specifies the URL of the service provider's terms of service.

fields.name: Log Web Requests
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to log exceptions that occur when connecting to the service. The log is located in the server Temp folder.
